OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Jaydev Unadkat bowling to Phil Salt, Unadkat picks up Salt in his very first ball! good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Phil Salt goes for a loft, this was out of his reach as he ends up slicing it high in the air. Klaasen calls it mine and completes the catch. Klaasen and Aniket Collide, though, but he holds on finally!

What a way to get into the milestone! good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Devdutt Padikkal gets into his position, stays deeper and lifts the loft, one bounce over long-off for a boundary! OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Harsh Dubey bowling to Devdutt Padikkal,Dubey gets the dangerous-looking DDP! full length ball, pitching outside leg stump, Devdutt Padikkal was so early on the loft, miscues it, this was the only shot he miscued this game, got the elevation right but not the distance! Goes high in the air, Klaasen at long off holds on and takes the catch! 

WICKET Devdutt Padikkal c Heinrich Klaasen b Harsh Dubey (Royal Challengers Bengaluru 110 Runs for 2 wickets)
